---
title: "Satellite Course Lectures"
anchor-sections: false
---

This page provides access to the lecture slide decks used in CoastWatch training courses. The lectures are designed to be short (about 20 minutes when narrated), and many have narrated versions available on YouTube. Use the table below to preview a lecture in your browser or download the slides for offline viewing.

Click the **eye** icon to preview the lecture slides directly on this page, **download** to go to the source file, **play button** to view the narrated lecture, and **clipboard** to read the transcript of the narrated lecture.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import HTML

df = pd.read_csv("lectures.csv", encoding="utf-8-sig").fillna("")

EYE_SVG = (
    '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" '
    'viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" '
    'stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">'
    '<path d="M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8S1 12 1 12z"></path>'
    '<circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"></circle>'
    '</svg>'
)

DOWNLOAD_SVG = (
    '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" '
    'viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" '
    'stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">'
    '<path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"></path>'
    '<path d="M7 10l5 5 5-5"></path>'
    '<path d="M12 15V3"></path>'
    '</svg>'
)

VIDEO_SVG = (
    '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" '
    'viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" '
    'stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">'
    '<polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"></polygon>'
    '</svg>'
)

TRANSCRIPT_SVG = (
    '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" '
    'viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" '
    'stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">'
    '<path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"></path>'
    '<path d="M14 2v6h6"></path>'
    '<path d="M16 13H8"></path>'
    '<path d="M16 17H8"></path>'
    '<path d="M10 9H8"></path>'
    '</svg>'
)


def normalize_url(url: str) -> str:
    """
    Normalize a file path so it resolves from the site root.

    Parameters
    ----------
    url : str
        A relative or absolute file path from the CSV.

    Returns
    -------
    str
        A normalized path beginning with a single leading slash, or an empty
        string if no URL is provided.
    """
    url = str(url).strip()
    if not url:
        return ""
    return "/" + url.lstrip("/")


def preview_icon(url: str) -> str:
    """
    Generate an HTML button element for previewing lecture slides in an
    embedded PDF modal.

    This function returns a clickable eye icon that opens a PDF slide deck
    inside an on-page modal viewer. If no valid URL is provided, a placeholder
    dash is returned instead.

    Parameters
    ----------
    url : str
        The site-relative path pointing to a previewable PDF lecture file.

    Returns
    -------
    str
        An HTML string containing a preview button with the PDF URL stored in
        a data attribute, or a dash ("—") if no URL is provided.
    """
    url = normalize_url(url)
    if not url:
        return "—"
    return (
        f'<button class="cg-icon cg-preview-btn" data-pdf="{url}" '
        f'aria-label="Preview lecture" type="button">{EYE_SVG}</button>'
    )


def download_icon(url: str) -> str:
    """
    Generate an HTML link element for downloading lecture PowerPoint files.

    This function creates a clickable download icon that links directly to a
    PowerPoint file. If no valid URL is supplied, a placeholder dash is
    returned.

    Parameters
    ----------
    url : str
        The site-relative path pointing to a downloadable lecture PowerPoint.

    Returns
    -------
    str
        An HTML string containing a download icon link, or a dash ("—") if
        no URL is provided.
    """
    url = normalize_url(url)
    if not url:
        return "—"
    return (
        f'<a href="{url}" class="cg-icon" download '
        f'aria-label="Download lecture PowerPoint">{DOWNLOAD_SVG}</a>'
    )


def video_icon(url: str) -> str:
    """
    Generate an HTML link element for watching a lecture video.

    This function returns a clickable video icon that links to an external
    video platform. If no valid URL is provided, a placeholder dash is
    returned.

    Parameters
    ----------
    url : str
        The URL pointing to a hosted lecture or training video.

    Returns
    -------
    str
        An HTML string containing a video icon link, or a dash ("—") if no
        URL is provided.
    """
    url = str(url).strip()
    if not url:
        return "—"
    return (
        f'<a href="{url}" class="cg-icon" target="_blank" rel="noopener" '
        f'aria-label="Watch lecture video">{VIDEO_SVG}</a>'
    )


def transcript_icon(url: str) -> str:
    """
    Generate an HTML link element for viewing a lecture video transcript.

    This function returns a clickable transcript icon that links to a text
    transcript of a lecture or training video. If no valid URL is provided,
    a placeholder dash is returned.

    Parameters
    ----------
    url : str
        The URL pointing to a lecture or video transcript resource.

    Returns
    -------
    str
        An HTML string containing a transcript icon link, or a dash ("—")
        if no URL is provided.
    """
    url = str(url).strip()
    if not url:
        return "—"
    return (
        f'<a href="{url}" class="cg-icon" target="_blank" rel="noopener" '
        f'aria-label="View video transcript">{TRANSCRIPT_SVG}</a>'
    )


# --- Category dropdown options ---
df["category"] = df.get("category", "").astype(str).str.strip()
cats = sorted([c for c in df["category"].unique() if str(c).strip()])

FILTER_UI = f"""
<div class="cg-filterbar">
  <div class="cg-filtergroup">
    <span class="cg-filterlabel">Category</span>
    <select id="lec-category" class="cg-select">
      <option value="">All</option>
      {''.join([f'<option value="{c}">{c}</option>' for c in cats])}
    </select>
  </div>
  <div class="cg-filtercount" id="lec-count"></div>
</div>
"""

# --- Table rows ---
table_rows = []
for _, r in df.iterrows():
    title = str(r.get("title", "")).strip()
    slug = title.lower().replace(" ", "-").replace("/", "-")
    cat   = str(r.get("category", "")).strip() or "Other"
    desc  = str(r.get("description", "")).strip()
    purl  = str(r.get("preview_url", "")).strip()     # PDF path
    durl  = str(r.get("download_url", "")).strip()    # PPTX path
    vurl  = str(r.get("video_url", "")).strip()
    turl  = str(r.get("transcript_url", "")).strip()

    table_rows.append(f"""
      <tr id="cg-{slug}" class="lec-row" data-category="{cat.replace('"','&quot;')}">
        <td>
          <a href="index.html#cg-{slug}"
             class="cg-title-link"
             onclick="cgScrollTo(event, 'cg-{slug}')">
            <strong>{title}</strong><br>
          </a>
          <span class="cg-desc">{desc}</span>
        </td>
        <td>{preview_icon(purl)}</td>
        <td>{download_icon(durl)}</td>
        <td>{video_icon(vurl)}</td>
        <td>{transcript_icon(turl)}</td>
      </tr>
    """)

table = f"""
<div class="cg-table-wrap">
  {FILTER_UI}
  <table class="code-gallery-table">
    <colgroup>
      <col style="width: 60%;">
      <col style="width: 10%;">
      <col style="width: 10%;">
      <col style="width: 10%;">
      <col style="width: 10%;">
    </colgroup>
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th>Lecture</th>
        <th>Preview</th>
        <th>Download</th>
        <th>Video</th>
        <th>Transcript</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      {''.join(table_rows)}
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div id="pdf-modal" class="pdf-modal" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="pdf-modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="pdf-modal-content" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Lecture slides preview">
    <button id="pdf-modal-close" class="pdf-modal-close" type="button" aria-label="Close preview">×</button>
    <iframe id="pdf-frame" class="pdf-frame" src="" title="Lecture slides preview"></iframe>
  </div>
</div>
"""

HTML(table)
```

<script>
(function(){
  function applyCategoryFilter(){
    const cat = document.getElementById("lec-category")?.value || "";
    const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("tr.lec-row"));
    let shown = 0;

    rows.forEach(row => {
      const rowCat = row.dataset.category || "";
      const ok = !cat || rowCat === cat;
      row.style.display = ok ? "" : "none";
      if(ok) shown += 1;
    });

    const countEl = document.getElementById("lec-count");
    if(countEl) countEl.textContent = `${shown} shown`;
  }

  function buildPdfViewerUrl(pdfPath){
    return pdfPath + "#toolbar=0&navpanes=0&scrollbar=1&view=FitH";
  }

  function setupPdfModal(){
    const modal = document.getElementById("pdf-modal");
    const frame = document.getElementById("pdf-frame");
    const closeBtn = document.getElementById("pdf-modal-close");
    const backdrop = document.querySelector(".pdf-modal-backdrop");

    if(!modal || !frame || !closeBtn || !backdrop) return;

    function openModal(pdfPath){
      frame.src = buildPdfViewerUrl(pdfPath);
      modal.classList.add("show");
      modal.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "false");
      document.body.style.overflow = "hidden";
    }

    function closeModal(){
      frame.src = "";
      modal.classList.remove("show");
      modal.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
      document.body.style.overflow = "";
    }

    document.addEventListener("click", function(e){
      const btn = e.target.closest(".cg-preview-btn");
      if(btn){
        const pdfPath = btn.getAttribute("data-pdf");
        if(pdfPath) openModal(pdfPath);
      }
    });

    closeBtn.addEventListener("click", closeModal);
    backdrop.addEventListener("click", closeModal);

    document.addEventListener("keydown", function(e){
      if(e.key === "Escape" && modal.classList.contains("show")){
        closeModal();
      }
    });
  }

  document.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    if(e.target && e.target.id === "lec-category") applyCategoryFilter();
  });

  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function(){
    applyCategoryFilter();
    setupPdfModal();
  });
})();
</script>

<script>
function cgScrollTo(e, id){
  e.preventDefault();

  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  if(!el) return;

  // update URL
  history.pushState(null, "", "#" + id);

  // scroll
  el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });

  // clear previous selection
  document.querySelectorAll(".cg-selected").forEach(row => {
    row.classList.remove("cg-selected");
  });

  // apply persistent highlight
  el.classList.add("cg-selected");
}
</script>

<script>
document.addEventListener("click", function(e){

  // ignore clicks on title links
  if (e.target.closest(".cg-title-link")) return;

  // ignore clicks inside modals
  if (e.target.closest(".cg-modal")) return;

  document.querySelectorAll(".cg-selected").forEach(row => {
    row.classList.remove("cg-selected");
  });

});
</script>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  if (window.location.hash) {
    const id = window.location.hash.replace("#","");
    const el = document.getElementById(id);

    if (el) {
      el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });
      el.classList.add("cg-selected");
    }
  }
});
</script>
